chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَحْرُمُ عَلَى الرَّجُلِ مِمَّا نَكَحَ ابْنُهُ وَ أَبُوهُ وَ مَا يَحِلُّ لَهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 75 – What is Prohibited upon the man, from what his son and his father can marry, and what is Permissible for him

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/173)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/173)
text: إِذَا جَرَّدَ الرَّجُلُ الْجَارِيَةَ وَ وَضَعَ يَدَهُ عَلَيْهَا فَلَا تَحِلُّ لِابْنِهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, form Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Rabie Bin Abdullah, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When the man bares the slave girl and places his hand upon her, so she would not be Permitted unto his father’.
en.sarwar: 5. Muhammad ibn ‘Isma’il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Rib’iy ibn ‘Abd Allah from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If a man makes a slave-girl bare and places his hand on her she becomes unlawful for his son.’”
